author: macfarla
content:
eth_baseFee method - has there been discussion on this? PRs have landed on ELs eg Besu https://github.com/besu-eth/besu/pull/10457 Geth https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/pull/34904
but has there been agreement on spec, naming etc?

author: boma_naps
content: Currently no we are just listing out methods that are in client and not in the spec and also some that has been up for discussion but has been stalled

author: boma_naps
content: I made this list please if you can go through it and leave a comment although sina suggested we start with method that are already implemented by clients and are missing in the spec then after that we walkthrough the list gradually for example this eth_baseFee I think only one client has it and it’s Reth
